title: Decorative Bags
description: Add upgradeable storage bags for seeds, bulk blocks, and more to your Decorative Storage system!
body:
# 🌾 **Decorative Bags — Addon for Decorative Storage**

✨ Decorative Bags is an addon for [Decorative Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-storage) that brings stylish and immersive storage bags into your Minecraft world!
These bags are designed to hold seeds 🌱, bulk blocks 🪨, and various resources 🧱, giving you a practical and decorative way to organize your items.

## **🎒 Features**

- 🌾 Seed Bags – store all kinds of seeds in one place!
- 🪨 Bulk Block Bags – keep sand, gravel, dirt, or other loose blocks neatly packed.
- 🧱 Resource Bags – store additional items and resources.
- 📈 Upgradeable Capacity – use special improvement items to expand storage size.
- 🎨 Decorative Look – bags fit naturally into your builds and storage systems.

## **⚙️ How It Works**

- Craft a bag 👜.
- Place your seeds, blocks, or resources inside.
- Apply an upgrade item 🔧 to increase the bag’s storage capacity.
- Enjoy a more organized and immersive storage system alongside Decorative Storage!

## **💡 Why use Decorative Bags?**

- ✔️ Perfect companion for farmers 👨‍🌾 and builders 🏗️.
- ✔️ Adds immersion & realism to your world.
- ✔️ Makes storage more efficient and expandable.
- ✔️ 100% compatible with Decorative Storage and its upgrade mechanics.

## **📦 Compatibility**

- ✅ Works with Decorative Storage (required).
- ✅ Forge / NeoForge support (depending on release).
- 🔄 Fully compatible with other storage mods (in the future updates).

⭐ Organize, decorate, and expand your storage possibilities with Decorative Bags!
